jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Simplilearn
jsonLd.description:
Simplilearn, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!
